Package com.sportradar.unifiedodds.sdk.internal.impl.entities.status

Class StageStatusImpl

java.lang.Object
com.sportradar.unifiedodds.sdk.internal.impl.entities.status.CompetitionStatusImpl
com.sportradar.unifiedodds.sdk.internal.impl.entities.status.StageStatusImpl
All Implemented Interfaces:
CompetitionStatus, StageStatus
public class StageStatusImpl extends CompetitionStatusImpl implements StageStatus
Provides methods used to access match status information
